description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a hip roof covered in reddish-brown tiles and beige stucco exterior walls. The house features a prominent front entryway with a covered porch supported by columns and a tiled overhang. Decorative stonework accents the corners and frames the windows, which are symmetrically arranged and fitted with metal security bars. The structure includes a side balcony with white railings and a secondary entrance accessible by a small set of steps. The windows are rectangular and evenly spaced, and the house sits on a paved foundation with walkways around its perimeter.
description: A two-story beige stucco house with a hip roof, covered porch, stone accents, and symmetrical barred windows. Features include a side balcony, tiled roof, and decorative entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, tiled overhang, and two upper windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a central window framed by stonework and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a single window and the side balcony with white railings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the balcony, secondary entrance, and additional windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with tiled overhang, columns, steps, and a central door framed by decorative stonework.
